gemma_observations: Klaasen is aggressively targeting short balls from Mukesh Choudhary.
Verma is content rotating strike and defending against Short.
Short seems content to concede width, allowing Klaasen to score freely.
Short is likely attempting to induce mistakes with slower balls.
